questionHtml: Describe two observations that indicate the reaction of lithium with water is exothermic.
markschemeHtml:
Any two:

temperature of the water increases ✔

lithium melts ✔

pop sound is heard ✔

 

Accept “lithium/hydrogen catches fire”.

Do not accept “smoke is observed”.

meta.title: Describe two observations that indicate the reaction of lithium with water is exothermic.
